narrative:
Danbury Twp township has 4,153 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.2 percentage points.
